title: Better illuminated
description: texture pack what make flashlight some better than original version like spyglass
body:
![LogoBilumena](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6bc0596cea23d32c2a66592bf5861d2e7b14a91.png)

# Better FlashLight  
*A realistic and animated handheld flashlight for Minecraft.*

**Please note:** For the best experience, this Texture pack requires **[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)** to enable smooth holding animations.

---

## ✨ Features
- Adds a functional, handheld flashlight to Minecraft
- Custom holding animations (requires Not Enough Animations)
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Compatible with most modern Minecraft modloaders

---

## 🛠 Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21-1.21.10 (Fabric/Quilt recommended)
- **[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)** (for animation support)

---

## 📦 How to Install & Animate
1. Install **Better FlashLight** and **Not Enough Animations**.
2. Launch Minecraft and open the **Mod Menu**.
3. Find **Not Enough Animations** and open its config.
4. Navigate to the *"Items for Holding Animations"* list.
5. Locate **"Flashlight"** and enable it by marking the checkbox.
6. Enjoy your animated flashlight in-game!

> *Note: Currently, there is no external guide page—follow the steps above for proper animation setup.*

---
